overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring the Mediterranean-inspired medieval town of Beauclair. The character walks through narrow market alleys, open courtyards, and steep cobblestone streets on a bright sunny day, passing colorful historic buildings and NPC villagers.

events.description: ground surface transitions from cobblestone to wooden planks between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow market alley passing wooden stalls and stacked barrels

rustic wooden market stalls with red awnings
stacked wooden barrels lining the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alley with stone walls and wooden market stalls. Geralt walks forward past barrels and stalls as the ground transitions from cobblestone to wooden planks, creating a corridor-like atmosphere with dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with dirt paths and stone steps

agents.ego_description: walking across open courtyard toward the cobblestone street ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking along the dirt path

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to a building entrance
tall distinctive blue tower with red roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard with dirt paths. The blue tower becomes visible in the distance as Geralt walks toward the cobblestone street, passing a woman in a red dress and wide stone steps on the left.

passing the blue tower on the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking up the cobblestone street lined with stone walls, Geralt approaches the distinctive blue tower. The stone archway becomes visible ahead as he passes the tower on his right, with a villager resting on steps nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cobblestone street through archway with red plaster buildings

events.description: passing through the stone archway into the upper town area
red plaster buildings become prominent on the right side

agents.ego_description: climbing steep cobblestone street through the archway, passing NPCs on side steps

notable_agents.action: child running up the stone steps on the right side

entered.detail: bright red plastered buildings with stone trim and wooden accents

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the street becomes steeper with vibrant red plaster buildings lining the right side. Geralt continues uphill on cobblestones, passing a child running on the steps and dense flower beds along the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone path approaching upper town plaza

events.description: path curves left revealing a fountain area in the plaza ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill on the winding path, approaching a small plaza with a fountain

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing standing near a wooden market stall

entered.detail: stone fountain structure visible in the plaza ahead
dense purple flowering bushes along the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The cobblestone path curves left as it continues uphill, revealing a fountain in the plaza ahead. Purple flowers line the stone walls while Geralt approaches the upper town area, passing a villager near a wooden stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined market alley into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a medieval town. It begins in a narrow corridor of stone walls and wooden stalls, moving past barrels as the ground shifts from cobblestone to wooden planks under dappled sunlight. As the camera emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a bright courtyard with dirt paths and a distant blue tower, passing a woman in a red dress before transitioning onto a rising cobblestone street. The path then leads through a stone archway where the terrain becomes steeper and the architecture shifts to vibrant red plaster buildings lined with dense flower beds. Finally, the street curves left and continues uphill past purple flowers and local villagers, revealing a fountain in a plaza as the camera reaches the upper town area.
